user.title: MasjidBox
user.description: Enter your masjid unique ID (slug from masjidbox.com/prayer-times/…). The integration discovers the API endpoint from the public website.

error.invalid_auth: API rejected the key (try again; the site may have updated)
error.discovery_failed: Could not find API settings on the prayer-times page (site layout may have changed)
error.invalid_unique_id: Prayer-times page not found for this ID

data.include_raw: Include raw API payload in attributes

data_description.poll_interval: How often to refresh prayer data
data_description.days: Number of days requested from the API (must cover today)
data_description.rediscover_on_reload: When enabled, fetches the site bundle again on each integration reload (e.g. HA restart)
data_description.include_raw: Adds a large raw JSON blob to the coordinator for debugging
